tweets.text: No rule can give the CFTC spot authority over digital assets, grant new sanctions authority against adversaries, or protect developers from unwarranted prosecution. Only Congress can. The Clarity Act is the only path that works.
tweets.summary: Sen. Lummis says only Congress via the Clarity Act can grant CFTC spot authority over digital assets and protect developers from prosecution.

tweets.text: Looking forward to joining @NathanBomey at @axios Live at 8:35am tomorrow, where we’ll discuss prediction markets, crypto, and the latest innovations on the new frontier of finance. Tune in here👇🔗 https://t.co/1CNB2we5H8
tweets.summary: CFTC Chairman Selig to discuss prediction markets and crypto innovation in upcoming Axios Live interview.

tweets.text: America is primed for digital asset leadership. The GENIUS Act has already helped unlock investment and innovation in the stablecoin sector. Now, we have an opportunity to strengthen America’s leadership in digital assets, but only if we pass the CLARITY Act. The time is now, let’s get it done. 🇺🇸
tweets.summary: Sen. Hagerty urges passing CLARITY Act to build on GENIUS Act's stablecoin framework and cement US digital asset leadership.
